movie.actors: Shia LaBeouf, Megan Fox, Josh Duhamel, Tyrese Gibson
movie.awards: Nominated for 3 Oscars. Another 20 wins & 41 nominations.
movie.plot: An ancient struggle between two Cybertronian races, the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons, comes to Earth, with a clue to the ultimate power held by a teenager.
movie.title: Transformers
movie.writer: Roberto Orci (screenplay), Alex Kurtzman (screenplay), John Rogers (story), Roberto Orci (story), Alex Kurtzman (story)
